packageFileDescriptions.AGENTS.md: This document provides an overview of the project structure for developers and AI agents working on this codebase.
packageFileDescriptions.netlify.toml: Netlify deployment config: build command (vite build), publish directory (dist/client), and dev server settings (port 8888, target 3000).
packageFileDescriptions.package.json: Project manifest with TanStack Start, React 19, Vite 7, Tailwind CSS 4, and Netlify plugin dependencies; defines dev and build scripts.
packageFileDescriptions.vite.config.ts.ejs: Vite config template: TanStack Start, React, Tailwind, Netlify plugin, and optional add-on integrations; processed by EJS.
packageFileDescriptions.tsconfig.json: TypeScript config: ES2022 target, strict mode, @/* path alias for src/*, bundler module resolution.
packageFileDescriptions.src/styles.css: Global styles: Tailwind import plus base body/code font styling.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/index.tsx: Home route (/) with TanStack Start welcome/landing page and links to docs.
packageFileDescriptions.src/routes/__root.tsx: Root layout: HTML shell, HeadContent, Header, styles, TanStack Devtools, and child route outlet.
packageFileDescriptions.src/router.tsx: TanStack Router setup: creates router from generated routeTree with scroll restoration.
packageFileDescriptions.src/components/HeaderNav.tsx.ejs: Navigation sidebar template: mobile menu, Home link, add-on routes; EJS-driven for dynamic route generation.
packageFileDescriptions.src/components/Header.tsx: Header component wrapping HeaderNav and site title link.
packageFileDescriptions.public/tanstack-word-logo-white.svg: TanStack wordmark logo (white) used in header/nav.
